title: Fit to Text
text: Fit to Text Determines whether the check box size is set to 1 cell to avoid display problems. True or False (default) Value Description True The size of a CheckBox without a label is adjusted to minimum size to avoid display problems. False The CheckBox size is unchanged. Description This property cannot be set in ProcScript. Applies To ucheckbox (CheckBox) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
